credentials.caCertificateDescription: Opsional: Unggah atau tempel file sertifikat yang ditandatangani CA (misalnya id_ed25519-cert.pub). Diperlukan jika server SSH Anda menggunakan otorisasi berbasis sertifikat.
credentials.noPublicKeyAvailable: No public key available. Open the credential editor first.

serverConfig.title: Server Configuration
serverConfig.description: Configure the Termix server URL to connect to your backend services
serverConfig.helpText: Enter the URL where your Termix server is running (e.g., http://localhost:30001 or https://your-server.com)
serverConfig.mustIncludeProtocol: Server URL must start with http:// or https://
serverConfig.allowInvalidCertificateDesc: Gunakan hanya untuk server mandiri tepercaya dengan sertifikat yang ditandatangani sendiri atau sertifikat alamat IP.
serverConfig.embeddedDesc: Run Termix with the built-in local server (no remote server needed)
serverConfig.embeddedNotReady: Local server is not ready yet. Please wait a moment and try again.

versionCheck.newVersionAvailable: A new version is available! You are running {{current}}, but {{latest}} is available.
versionCheck.betaVersionDesc: You are running {{current}}, which is newer than the latest stable release {{latest}}.

hosts.metricsIntervalDesc: How often to collect server statistics (5s - 1h)
hosts.overrideCredentialUsernameDesc: Gunakan nama pengguna yang telah ditentukan di atas, bukan nama pengguna kredensial.
hosts.oidcUsernameHint: Use $oidc.preferred_username to substitute your OIDC login name.
hosts.wolBroadcastAddressDesc: Optional directed broadcast for Docker/routed networks (e.g. 192.168.1.255). Leave empty to use 255.255.255.255.
hosts.pinToTopDesc: Selalu tampilkan penyedia layanan ini di bagian atas daftar.
hosts.noPortKnocking: Tidak ada port knocking yang dikonfigurasi.
hosts.noJumpHosts: Tidak ada jump host yang dikonfigurasi.
hosts.keyReplaceNotice: Tempelkan kunci baru di bawah ini untuk menggantinya.
hosts.keyPassphraseSaved: Kata sandi tersimpan, ketik untuk mengubahnya
hosts.opksshDesc: Sign in to this host using your identity provider instead of a password or key. Requires OPKSSH set up on the server.
hosts.warpgateDesc: This host connects through a Warpgate SSH proxy. Termix will handle the browser-based approval flow automatically after authenticating.
hosts.tailscaleNoApiKey: No Tailscale API key configured. Add one in Admin Settings to enable device discovery.
hosts.tailscaleNoDevices: No devices found in your tailnet.
hosts.tailscaleDeviceAutoFill: Selecting a device will auto-fill the host IP address.
hosts.forceKeyboardInteractiveShortDesc: Paksa memasukkan kata sandi secara manual meskipun kunci tersedia.
hosts.allowLegacyAlgorithmsDesc: Enable deprecated SSH algorithms (ssh-dss, ssh-rsa, diffie-hellman-group1-sha1, hmac-md5, 3des-cbc) for connections to old devices that cannot be upgraded.
hosts.cursorBlinkingDesc: Aktifkan animasi berkedip untuk kursor terminal.
hosts.rightClickSelectsWordShortDesc: Pilih kata di bawah kursor dengan klik kanan.
hosts.backgroundImageDesc: Optional URL for a terminal background image
hosts.syntaxHighlightingDesc: Colorize terminal output (errors, paths, IPs, timestamps)
hosts.syntaxHighlightingCategoriesDesc: Choose which types of content to colorize
hosts.scrollbackMaxLines: Jumlah maksimum baris yang disimpan dalam riwayat
hosts.sshAgentForwardingShortDesc: Berikan kunci SSH lokal Anda ke host ini.
hosts.useSSHTitleDesc: Update the tab title from the shell's window title instead of the host name
hosts.enableAutoMoshDesc: Lebih baik menggunakan Mosh daripada SSH jika tersedia.
hosts.enableAutoTmuxDesc: Secara otomatis meluncurkan atau terhubung ke sesi tmux.
hosts.enableSessionLoggingDesc: Record terminal session output for later review
hosts.enableCommandHistoryDesc: Record commands run in this terminal for history and autocomplete
hosts.linkClickBehaviorDesc: Controls what happens when you click a link in the terminal. Use 'Default' to follow the app-level setting.
hosts.linkClickBehaviorConfirm: Show popup to open or copy
hosts.sudoPasswordAutoFillShortDesc: Secara otomatis memberikan kata sandi sudo saat diminta.
hosts.sudoPasswordAutoFillDesc: Store a sudo password so host metrics, terminal prompts, and others can run privileged commands automatically.
hosts.noEnvVars: Tidak ada variabel lingkungan yang dikonfigurasi.
hosts.enableTunnelingDesc: Aktifkan fungsi terowongan SSH untuk host ini.
hosts.tunnelModeLocalDesc: Teruskan port lokal ke port pada server jarak jauh (atau host yang dapat dijangkau dari server tersebut).
hosts.tunnelModeRemoteDesc: Teruskan port pada server jarak jauh kembali ke port lokal pada mesin Anda.
hosts.tunnelModeDynamicDesc: Buat proxy SOCKS5 pada port lokal untuk penerusan port dinamis.
hosts.autoStartDesc: Terowongan ini akan terhubung secara otomatis saat host dimuat.
hosts.enableDockerMonitorDesc: Pantau dan kelola kontainer di host ini melalui Docker.
hosts.enableTmuxMonitorDesc: Show this host in the Tmux Monitor and add its tmux actions to the sidebar
hosts.enableProxmoxDesc: Mark this host as a Proxmox node. Enables guest discovery and import directly from this host.
hosts.proxmoxDefaultAuthTypeDesc: Authentication method applied to imported guest hosts. Choose the auth type that matches how you connect to your guests.
hosts.proxmoxDefaultCredentialDesc: Credential used for imported guest hosts when auth type is set to Credential.
hosts.proxmoxWindowsDetectionDesc: Comma-separated name patterns that trigger RDP instead of SSH (case-insensitive)
hosts.proxmoxDockerDetectionDesc: Comma-separated name patterns that enable Docker for matching guests
hosts.proxmoxPreferredRangesDesc: Comma-separated prefixes in priority order for IP selection when a guest has multiple interfaces
hosts.proxmoxNoGuests: No guests found on this Proxmox node.
hosts.enableFileManagerMonitorDesc: Jelajahi dan kelola file di host ini melalui SFTP.
hosts.scpLegacyDesc: Use legacy file transfer for servers that do not support the SFTP subsystem (e.g. embedded or minimal SSH servers).
hosts.fileManagerPathHint: Direktori yang akan dibuka saat pengelola file diluncurkan untuk host ini.
hosts.enableStatusChecksDesc: Lakukan ping secara berkala ke host ini untuk memverifikasi ketersediaan.
hosts.useGlobalIntervalDesc: Ganti dengan interval pemeriksaan status di seluruh server.
hosts.enableMetricsDesc: Kumpulkan data penggunaan CPU, RAM, disk, dan jaringan dari host ini.
hosts.useGlobalMetricsDesc: Ganti dengan interval metrik di seluruh server.
hosts.widgetsMovedToHostMetrics: Cards are now added, arranged, and resized directly in the Host Metrics tab. Open Host Metrics for this host and use Customize to choose which cards are shown.
hosts.cpuUsageDesc: Persentase CPU, rata-rata beban, grafik sparkline
hosts.uptimeDesc: Waktu aktif sistem dan waktu booting
hosts.systemInfoDesc: Sistem operasi, kernel, nama host, arsitektur
hosts.listeningPortsDesc: Buka port dengan proses dan status.
hosts.quickActionsToolbar: Quick actions appear as buttons in the Host Metrics toolbar for one-click command execution.
hosts.credentialNameRequired: Please enter a name for the credential
hosts.addFirstHost: Tambahkan host pertama Anda untuk memulai.
hosts.deleteAllInFolder: Delete all hosts in "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
hosts.folderDialogDescription: Choose a name, color, and icon. Use / to nest folders.
hosts.folderNestingHint: Use / to separate levels and create nested folders.
hosts.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and its {{count}} host(s)? This cannot be undone.
hosts.deleteHostsConfirm: Delete {{count}} host{{plural}}? This cannot be undone.
hosts.generateKeyPairDesc: Buat pasangan kunci baru, baik kunci privat maupun kunci publik akan terisi secara otomatis.
hosts.tunnelRequirementsText: Server SSH harus memiliki pengaturan GatewayPorts yes, AllowTcpForwarding yes, dan PermitRootLogin yes di /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
hosts.enableAtLeastOneProtocol: Aktifkan setidaknya satu protokol di atas untuk mengkonfigurasi pengaturan otentikasi dan koneksi.
hosts.generateKeyPairDescription: Buat pasangan kunci baru, baik kunci privat maupun kunci publik akan terisi secara otomatis.

sharing.requiresCredential: Host ini harus menggunakan kredensial agar dapat berbagi. Edit host dan tetapkan kredensial terlebih dahulu.

guac.loadBalanceInfoDesc: RD Connection Broker cookie for RDS farm load balancing (e.g. tsv://MS Terminal Services Plugin.1.CollectionName)
guac.guacdProxyDesc: Override the global guacd instance for this connection. Leave blank to use the globally configured guacd.
guac.ignoreCertificateDesc: Izinkan koneksi ke host dengan sertifikat yang ditandatangani sendiri.
guac.forceLosslessDesc: Paksa pengkodean gambar tanpa kehilangan data (kualitas lebih tinggi, bandwidth lebih besar)
guac.disableAudioDesc: Nonaktifkan semua audio dari sesi jarak jauh.
guac.enableAudioInputDesc: Teruskan mikrofon lokal ke sesi jarak jauh.
guac.wallpaperDesc: Tampilkan wallpaper desktop (menonaktifkannya akan meningkatkan kinerja)
guac.menuAnimationsDesc: Aktifkan animasi pudar dan geser menu
guac.disableBitmapCachingDesc: Matikan cache bitmap (dapat membantu mengatasi gangguan)
guac.enablePrintingDesc: Alihkan printer lokal ke sesi jarak jauh.
guac.enableDriveRedirectionDesc: Petakan folder lokal sebagai drive di sesi jarak jauh.
guac.createDrivePathDesc: Buat folder secara otomatis jika belum ada.
guac.disableDownloadDesc: Mencegah pengunduhan file dari sesi jarak jauh
guac.disableUploadDesc: Mencegah pengunggahan file ke sesi jarak jauh
guac.consoleSessionDesc: Hubungkan ke konsol (sesi 0) alih-alih sesi baru.
guac.sendWolPacketDesc: Kirim paket ajaib untuk membangunkan host ini sebelum terhubung.
guac.disableCopyDesc: Mencegah penyalinan teks dari sesi jarak jauh
guac.disablePasteDesc: Mencegah penyisipan teks ke dalam sesi jarak jauh
guac.includeKeystrokesDesc: Rekam setiap ketukan keyboard mentah selain output layar.
guac.swapRedBlueDesc: Tukar saluran warna merah dan biru (memperbaiki beberapa masalah warna)
guac.readOnlyDesc: Lihat layar jarak jauh tanpa mengirimkan input apa pun.
guac.sharingOptionsAfterSave: Opsi berbagi tersedia setelah host disimpan.
guac.sharingLoadError: Gagal memuat data berbagi. Periksa koneksi Anda dan coba lagi.
guac.noExpiryPlaceholder: Biarkan kosong agar tidak ada tanggal kedaluwarsa.

commandPalette.addCredentialDesc: Simpan kunci atau kata sandi SSH
commandPalette.tmuxMonitorDesc: Monitor tmux sessions across your hosts

connections.noConnectionsDesc: Buka terminal, pengelola file, atau desktop jarak jauh untuk melihat koneksi di sini.
connections.backgroundDesc: Sesi tetap aktif selama 30 menit setelah terputus dan dapat disambungkan kembali.
connections.noSearchResults: Tidak ada koneksi yang sesuai dengan pencarian Anda.

guacamole.guacdUnavailable: Layanan desktop jarak jauh (guacd) tidak tersedia. Pastikan guacd berjalan, dapat diakses, dan dikonfigurasi dengan benar di pengaturan admin.

terminal.clipboardWriteFailed: Failed to copy to clipboard. Make sure the page is served over HTTPS or localhost.
terminal.clipboardReadFailed: Failed to read from clipboard. Make sure clipboard permissions are granted.
terminal.clipboardHttpWarning: Paste requires HTTPS. Use Ctrl+Shift+V or serve Termix over HTTPS.
terminal.tmuxUnavailable: tmux is not installed on the remote host, falling back to standard shell
terminal.tmuxSessionPickerDesc: Existing tmux sessions found on this host. Select one to reattach or create a new session.
terminal.tmuxCopyHint: Adjust selection and press Enter to copy to clipboard
terminal.opksshAuthDescription: Complete authentication in your browser to continue. This session will remain valid for 24 hours.
terminal.opksshTimeout: Authentication timed out. Please try again.
terminal.opksshAuthFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
terminal.websocketAbnormalClose: Connection closed unexpectedly. This may be due to a reverse proxy or SSL configuration issue. Please check server logs.
terminal.connectionLogCopyFailed: Failed to copy logs to clipboard
terminal.connectionRejected: Connection rejected by server. Please check your authentication and network configuration.
terminal.hostKeyRejected: SSH host key verification rejected. Connection cancelled.
terminal.sessionTakenOver: Session was opened in another tab. Reconnecting...

fileManager.enterSudoPassword: Enter sudo password to continue this operation
fileManager.selectHostToStart: Select a host to start file management
fileManager.sshRequiredForFileManager: Pengelola file memerlukan SSH. Host ini tidak mengaktifkan SSH.
fileManager.failedToCopyPath: Failed to copy path to clipboard
fileManager.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
fileManager.confirmDeleteSingleItem: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"?
fileManager.confirmDeleteMultipleItems: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} items?
fileManager.confirmDeleteMultipleItemsWithFolders: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{count}} items? This includes folders and their contents.
fileManager.confirmDeleteFolder: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the folder "{{name}}" and all its contents?
fileManager.permanentDeleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The item(s) will be permanently deleted from the server.
fileManager.undoCopySuccess: Undid copy operation: Deleted {{count}} copied files
fileManager.undoCopyFailedDelete: Undo failed: Could not delete any copied files
fileManager.undoCopyFailedNoInfo: Undo failed: Could not find copied file information
fileManager.undoMoveSuccess: Undid move operation: Moved {{count}} files back to original location
fileManager.undoMoveFailedMove: Undo failed: Could not move any files back
fileManager.undoMoveFailedNoInfo: Undo failed: Could not find moved file information
fileManager.undoDeleteNotSupported: Delete operation cannot be undone: Files have been permanently deleted from server
fileManager.largeFileWarningDesc: This file is {{size}} in size, which may cause performance issues when opened as text.
fileManager.fileNotFoundAndRemoved: File "{{name}}" not found and has been removed from recent/pinned files
fileManager.serverErrorOccurred: Server error occurred. Please try again later.
fileManager.dragOutsideToDownload: Drag outside window to download ({{count}} files)
fileManager.sshConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed. Please check your connection to {{name}} ({{ip}}:{{port}})
fileManager.name: Name
fileManager.pdfLoadError: Terjadi kesalahan saat memuat file PDF ini.

transfer.noHostsConnected: Tidak ada penyedia pengelola file lain yang tersedia.
transfer.noHostsConnectedHint: Tambahkan host SSH lain dengan File Manager diaktifkan di Host Manager.
transfer.destMustBeDirectory: Tujuan harus berupa direktori untuk transfer multi-item.
transfer.browsePathWillBeCreated: Folder ini belum ada. Folder ini akan dibuat saat transfer dimulai.
transfer.browsePathError: Tidak dapat membuka jalur ini pada host tujuan.
transfer.hostAuthRequired: Diperlukan autentikasi — buka File Manager di host ini terlebih dahulu.
transfer.parallelSegmentsHint: File berukuran besar dibagi menjadi bagian-bagian berukuran 256 MB. Beberapa jalur menggunakan koneksi terpisah (seperti memulai beberapa transfer) untuk throughput total yang lebih tinggi.
transfer.jumpHostLimitation: Kedua host harus dapat dijangkau dari server Termix. Perutean langsung antar host tidak didukung.
transfer.methodAutoHint: Memilih antara tar atau SFTP per-file berdasarkan jumlah file, ukuran, dan kemampuan kompresi. File tunggal selalu menggunakan SFTP streaming.
transfer.methodTarHint: Kompres di sumber, transfer satu arsip, ekstrak di tujuan. Membutuhkan tar di kedua host Unix.
transfer.methodItemSftpHint: Transfer setiap file secara individual melalui SFTP. Berfungsi di semua host termasuk Windows.
transfer.methodPreviewError: Metode transfer tidak dapat dipratinjau. Server akan tetap memilih metode saat Anda memulai.
transfer.methodItemSftpLimitation: Setiap berkas menggunakan aliran SFTP yang sama sebagai salinan berkas tunggal, satu demi satu. Kemajuan digabungkan di semua berkas, sehingga bilah kemajuan bergerak lambat selama pemrosesan berkas berukuran besar.

methodReason.tar_unavailable: Tar tidak tersedia di salah satu atau kedua host — SFTP per-file akan digunakan sebagai gantinya.
methodReason.windows_host: Sistem operasi yang digunakan adalah Windows — tar tidak digunakan.
methodReason.auto_multi_large: Auto: multiple files including a large file ({{largestSize}}) with compressible data — tar bundles into one transfer.
methodReason.auto_single_large_in_archive: Auto: one large file ({{largestSize}}) in this set — per-file SFTP.
methodReason.auto_many_incompressible: Otomatis: sebagian besar data tidak dapat dikompresi — SFTP per file.
methodReason.auto_many_files: Auto: many files ({{fileCount}}) — tar reduces per-file overhead.
methodReason.auto_default: Otomatis: SFTP per-file untuk set ini.

transfer.resumedHint: Terhubung kembali ke transfer aktif yang dimulai di jendela lain.
transfer.transferCancelledCopyHint: File yang tidak lengkap mungkin masih tersisa di tujuan.
transfer.transferCancelledMoveHint: Sebagian berkas mungkin masih tersisa di tujuan. Berkas sumber tidak dihapus.
transfer.cleanupDestFilesSuccess: File parsial telah dihapus dari tujuan.
transfer.cleanupDestFilesPartial: Beberapa file parsial tidak dapat dihapus.
transfer.cleanupDestFilesNothing: Tidak ada yang perlu dibersihkan di tempat tujuan.
transfer.transferFailedRetryHint: Sebagian data tersimpan di tujuan. Upaya pengulangan akan dilanjutkan saat koneksi kembali pulih.

tunnels.createFirstTunnelMessage: You haven't created any SSH tunnels yet. Configure tunnel connections in the Host Manager to get started.
tunnels.endpointSshHostRequired: Pilih host SSH titik akhir untuk setiap terowongan klien.
tunnels.noClientTunnels: Tidak ada terowongan klien yang dikonfigurasi pada desktop ini.
tunnels.clientAutoStartDesc: Proses dimulai saat klien desktop ini dibuka dan tetap terhubung.
tunnels.clientManualStartDesc: Gunakan tombol Mulai dan Berhenti dari baris ini. Termix tidak akan membukanya secara otomatis.
tunnels.clientRemoteServerNote: Penerusan jarak jauh mungkin memerlukan AllowTcpForwarding dan GatewayPorts pada server SSH titik akhir. Port jarak jauh akan tertutup ketika desktop ini terputus.
tunnels.invalidBindIp: IP lokal harus berupa alamat IPv4 yang valid.
tunnels.invalidLocalTargetIp: Alamat IP target lokal harus berupa alamat IPv4 yang valid.
tunnels.invalidLocalPort: Port lokal harus berada di antara 1 dan 65535.
tunnels.invalidRemotePort: Port jarak jauh harus berada di antara 1 dan 65535.
tunnels.invalidLocalTargetPort: Port target lokal harus berada di antara 1 dan 65535.
tunnels.invalidEndpointPort: Port endpoint harus berada di antara 1 dan 65535.
tunnels.duplicateAutoStartBind: Only one auto-start client tunnel can use {{bind}}.
tunnels.typeServerLocalDesc: Host saat ini ke titik akhir.
tunnels.typeServerRemoteDesc: Endpoint kembali ke host saat ini.
tunnels.typeClientRemoteDesc: Titik akhir kembali ke komputer lokal.
tunnels.typeDynamicDesc: Meneruskan lalu lintas SOCKS5 CONNECT melalui SSH
tunnels.retryIntervalDescription: Time to wait between retry attempts.

cardGrid.empty: No cards. Use Add below to place cards.

hostMetrics.cannotFetchMetrics: Cannot fetch metrics from offline server
hostMetrics.noneAuthNotSupported: Host Metrics does not support 'none' authentication type.
hostMetrics.editModeInstructions: Drag cards to rearrange, drag the bottom edge to resize, and use the width button to change a card's span. Add or remove cards below.

managers.sudoHint: Set a sudo password for this host in the host editor to enable privileged actions.
managers.noAcmeClient: No ACME client (certbot or acme.sh) found on this host.
managers.firewallWarning: Changes are runtime-only until persisted. Be careful not to lock yourself out.
managers.sslIssueHint: DNS provider credentials must already be configured on the host.
managers.sslRevokeConfirm: Revoke and remove the certificate "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
managers.healthMissingFields: Each check needs a name and target

auth.tagline: Manajemen SSH dan desktop jarak jauh yang dihosting sendiri
auth.sshNoKeyboardInteractiveDescription: The server does not support keyboard-interactive authentication. Please provide your password or SSH key.
auth.sshAuthFailedDescription: The provided credentials were incorrect. Please try again with valid credentials.
auth.sshTimeoutDescription: The authentication attempt timed out. Please try again.
auth.sshProvideCredentialsDescription: Please provide your SSH credentials to connect to this server.
auth.sshPasswordDescription: Enter the password for this SSH connection.
auth.sshKeyPasswordDescription: If your SSH key is encrypted, enter the passphrase here.
auth.passphraseRequiredDescription: Kunci SSH dienkripsi. Silakan masukkan kata sandi untuk membukanya.
auth.firstUserMessage: You are the first user and will be made an admin. You can view admin settings in the sidebar user dropdown. If you think this is a mistake, check the docker logs, or create a GitHub issue.
auth.loginWithExternalDesc: Login using your configured external identity provider
auth.externalNotSupportedInElectron: External authentication is not supported in the Electron app yet. Please use the web version for OIDC login.
auth.resetCodeDesc: Enter your username to receive a password reset code. The code will be logged in the docker container logs.
auth.enterResetCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the docker container logs for user:
auth.enterNewPassword: Enter your new password for user:
auth.loggingInToDesktopApp: Logging in to the desktop app
auth.dataLossWarning: Resetting your password this way will delete all your saved SSH hosts, credentials, and other encrypted data. This action cannot be undone. Only use this if you have forgotten your password and are not logged in.
auth.authenticationDisabledDesc: All authentication methods are currently disabled. Please contact your administrator.
auth.passwordLoginDisabledDesc: Password login is disabled. Please use an external authentication provider below.

hostKey.firstConnectionTitle: First time connecting to this host
hostKey.firstConnectionDescription: The authenticity of this host cannot be established. Verify the fingerprint matches what you expect.
hostKey.keyChangedDescription: The host key for this server has changed since your last connection. This could indicate a security issue.
hostKey.verifyInstructions: If you trust this host, click Accept to continue and save this fingerprint for future connections.

errors.databaseConnection: Could not connect to the database
errors.silentSigninOidcUnavailable: Login senyap telah diminta, tetapi login OIDC tidak tersedia.
errors.failedUserInfo: Gagal mendapatkan informasi pengguna setelah login.
errors.invalidAuthUrl: Invalid authorization URL received from backend
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired - please log in again
errors.totpRateLimited: Rate limited: Too many TOTP verification attempts. Please try again later.

errors.resetCodeRateLimited: Rate limited: Too many verification attempts. Please try again later.
errors.resetCodeRateLimitedWithTime: Rate limited: Too many verification attempts. Please wait {{time}} seconds before trying again.

messages.registrationDisabled: New account registration is currently disabled by an admin. Please log in or contact an administrator.
messages.userNotAllowed: Your account is not authorized to register. Please contact an administrator.
messages.databaseConnectionFailed: Failed to connect to the database server
messages.resetCodeSent: Reset code sent to Docker logs

profile.c2sTunnelConfigDesc: Terowongan desktop lokal yang menargetkan host SSH yang telah dikonfigurasi.
profile.c2sTunnelPresetsDesc: Simpan daftar terowongan lokal klien desktop ini sebagai preset server bernama, atau muat preset kembali ke klien ini.
profile.c2sTunnelPresetsUnavailable: Pengaturan terowongan klien hanya tersedia di klien desktop.

profile.c2sPresetLoaded: Pengaturan terowongan klien dimuat secara lokal.

admin.ssoDeleteConfirm: Delete this provider? Associated users will be unable to login.
admin.sslDescription: Automatically issue and renew a trusted SSL certificate from Let's Encrypt. Requires a public domain and port 80 or DNS access.
admin.sslDomainDesc: The public domain name for the certificate.
admin.sslEmailDesc: Contact email for Let's Encrypt notifications and account.
admin.sslChallengeTypeDesc: How to prove domain ownership to Let's Encrypt.
admin.sslChallengeHttp: HTTP (webroot) - requires port 80 accessible from the internet
admin.sslChallengeDns: DNS (Cloudflare) - requires a Cloudflare API token
admin.sslCloudflareTokenDesc: Scoped token with Zone:DNS:Edit permission for your domain.
admin.sslInfoNote: After issuing a certificate, enable SSL in your environment variables (ENABLE_SSL=true) and restart Termix.
admin.allowRegistrationDesc: Let new users self-register with a username and password
admin.oidcAutoProvisionDesc: Auto-create accounts for OIDC/SSO users on first login (independent of the registration toggle)
admin.oidcSilentLoginDefaultDesc: Automatically redirect to OIDC login on every visit, skipping the login form entirely
admin.commandHistoryEnabledDesc: Allow command history recording. When disabled, history is not saved regardless of per-host settings.
admin.updateCommandHistoryFailed: Failed to update command history setting
admin.tailscaleApiKeyDescription: Used for device discovery in the host editor. Generate a key at tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys.
admin.oidcDescription: Konfigurasikan OpenID Connect untuk SSO. Kolom yang ditandai * wajib diisi.
admin.oidcAllowedUsersDesc: Satu email per baris. Biarkan kosong untuk mengizinkan semua email.
admin.oidcAdminGroupDesc: Users in this group are granted admin. Leave empty to disable group sync.
admin.oidcGroupClaimDesc: Optional. The claim path that contains the user's groups. Defaults to groups, roles, then group. Use this for providers with a custom claim (e.g. Zitadel).
admin.oidcCaCertDesc: Optional. PEM-encoded CA certificate for OIDC providers using a private or self-signed CA. Leave empty to use the system trust store.
admin.exportDatabaseDesc: Unduh cadangan semua host, kredensial, dan pengaturan.
admin.apiKeyCreatedWarning: Kunci telah dibuat - salin sekarang, kunci ini tidak akan ditampilkan lagi.
admin.revokeAllSessionsSuccess: Semua sesi untuk pengguna telah dicabut.
admin.noCustomRoles: Tidak ada peran khusus yang ditentukan.
admin.userAdminAccessDesc: Akses penuh ke semua pengaturan admin.
admin.revokeAllUserSessionsDesc: Paksa masuk ulang di semua perangkat
admin.editUserDesc: Edit peran, status admin, sesi, dan pengaturan akun.
admin.linkAccountDesc: Merge the OIDC account {{username}} with an existing local account.
admin.linkAccountDescLocal: Link a local account {{username}} with an existing OIDC-only account.
admin.linkAccountEffect2: Tambahkan login OIDC ke akun target.
admin.linkAccountEffect3: Izinkan login melalui OIDC dan kata sandi.
admin.linkAccountTargetPlaceholder: Masukkan nama pengguna akun lokal yang ingin dihubungkan.
admin.linkAccountOidcPlaceholder: Enter the OIDC-only account username to merge in
admin.linkAccountOidcNotFound: No OIDC-only account found with that username
admin.unlinkAccountDesc: Remove OIDC authentication from {{username}}. They will only be able to log in with their password.
admin.unlinkAccountWarning: This will remove OIDC login from this account. The user must have a password set to continue logging in.
admin.updatePasswordLoginFailed: Gagal memperbarui pengaturan login kata sandi.
admin.cannotDisablePasswordLoginWithTotp: Cannot disable password login while 2FA is enabled for one or more users. Disable 2FA first.
admin.updateOidcAutoProvisionFailed: Gagal memperbarui pengaturan penyediaan otomatis OIDC.
admin.updateOidcSilentLoginDefaultFailed: Failed to update silent OIDC login setting
admin.updatePasswordResetFailed: Gagal memperbarui pengaturan pengaturan ulang kata sandi.
admin.sessionTimeoutRange2: Batas waktu sesi harus antara 1 dan 720 jam.
admin.createUserRequired: Nama pengguna dan kata sandi diperlukan.
admin.createUserPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
admin.createRoleRequired: Nama dan nama tampilan wajib diisi.
admin.hostDefaultsDesc: Settings applied automatically when creating a new host. Individual hosts can still override these.
admin.hostDefaultsUseSocks5Desc: Pre-fill SOCKS5 proxy on all new hosts
admin.hostDefaultsMetricsEnabledDesc: Collect CPU, memory, and other stats on new hosts by default
admin.hostDefaultsStatusCheckEnabledDesc: Poll online/offline status on new hosts by default
admin.hostDefaultsSessionLoggingDesc: Record terminal sessions on new hosts by default
admin.hostDefaultsCommandHistoryDesc: Track command history on new hosts by default

history.noTerminalSelectedHint: Buka tab terminal SSH untuk melihat riwayat perintahnya.
history.trackingDisabledHint: Enable it in the host's terminal settings.

sshTools.noTerminalTabsOpen: Tidak ada tab terminal yang terbuka.
sshTools.broadcastInputPlaceholder: Ketik di sini untuk menyiarkan ketukan keyboard...

splitScreen.selectLayoutHint: Pilih berapa banyak panel yang ingin ditampilkan.
splitScreen.dragTabsHint: Seret tab ke panel di atas, atau gunakan Penugasan Cepat.

snippets.title: Snippets
snippets.createSnippetDescription: Create a new command snippet for quick execution
snippets.noTerminalTabsOpen: Tidak ada tab terminal yang terbuka.
snippets.noSnippetsInFolder: Tidak ada cuplikan di folder ini
snippets.editFolderDescription: Ganti nama atau ubah tampilan folder ini
snippets.importDescription: Import snippets and folders from a JSON file exported by Termix
snippets.importDropOrClick: Drop a JSON file here or click to browse
snippets.importOverwrite: Overwrite existing snippets with the same name and folder
snippets.importSuccess: Import complete: {{snippets}} snippet(s) added, {{updated}} updated, {{skipped}} skipped, {{folders}} folder(s) added
snippets.importInvalidFile: Invalid file: expected a JSON object with snippets or folders arrays
snippets.targetHostsHint: Assign hosts to run this snippet directly without an open terminal.
snippets.directRunPartialFail: "{{name}}" failed on one or more hosts
snippets.executionResultDescription: Output from running the snippet on each target host.

userProfile.storageModeDescription: Browser stores settings in this browser only. Database syncs to the server and loads on any device.
userProfile.changeServerDescription: Switch to a different Termix backend server
userProfile.deleteAccountPermanent: Tindakan ini bersifat permanen dan tidak dapat dibatalkan.
userProfile.deleteAccountWarning: Semua sesi, host, kredensial, dan pengaturan akan dihapus secara permanen.
userProfile.commandAutocompleteDesc: Tampilkan fitur pelengkapan otomatis saat mengetik.
userProfile.terminalLinkBehaviorDesc: Default behavior when clicking links in the terminal
userProfile.reopenTabsOnLoginDesc: Pulihkan tab yang terbuka saat Anda masuk atau menyegarkan halaman, bahkan dari perangkat lain.
userProfile.confirmTabCloseDesc: Tanyakan terlebih dahulu sebelum menutup tab terminal.
userProfile.hostTrayOnClickDesc: Selalu tampilkan tombol koneksi; klik untuk memperluas opsi manajemen, bukan dengan mengarahkan kursor.
userProfile.compactHostViewDesc: Collapse each host to a single line showing only its name and address
userProfile.statusColorsDesc: Use green/red for online/offline status instead of the accent color
userProfile.pinAppRailDesc: Pertahankan agar bilah sisi kiri aplikasi selalu terbuka, alih-alih terbuka saat diarahkan kursor.
userProfile.navigationTabsDesc: Choose which tabs appear in the app rail
userProfile.totpInstructions: Pindai kode QR atau masukkan kode rahasia di aplikasi otentikasi Anda, lalu masukkan kode 6 digit.
userProfile.createApiKeyDescription: Buat kunci API baru untuk akses terprogram.
userProfile.apiKeyPermissionsHint: Kunci mewarisi izin dari pengguna yang membuatnya.
userProfile.totpInvalidCode: Kode tidak valid, silakan coba lagi.
userProfile.totpDisableInputRequired: Masukkan kode TOTP atau kata sandi Anda.
userProfile.totpDisablePlaceholder: Masukkan kode TOTP atau kata sandi.
userProfile.passwordFieldsRequired: Kata sandi lama dan baru wajib diisi.
userProfile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
userProfile.deletePasswordRequired: Kata sandi diperlukan untuk menghapus akun Anda.

tmuxMonitor.title: Tmux Monitor
tmuxMonitor.tmuxUnavailable: tmux is not installed on this host
tmuxMonitor.noSessions: No tmux sessions on this host
tmuxMonitor.selectPaneHint: Select a pane to preview its output
tmuxMonitor.resizeTree: Drag to resize — double-click to reset
tmuxMonitor.killWindowBody: Every pane and process in this window will be terminated. Killing the last window ends the session.
tmuxMonitor.killPaneBody: The process running in this pane will be terminated. Killing the last pane closes its window.
tmuxMonitor.killSessionBody: All windows and running processes in this session will be terminated. This cannot be undone.
tmuxMonitor.hostUnreachable: Could not connect to the host. Check that it is online and reachable.
tmuxMonitor.noServer: No tmux server is running on this host.
tmuxMonitor.searchTruncated: Partial results — search covers the last {{lines}} lines of each pane and at most {{panes}} panes.
tmuxMonitor.noHostsHint: Enable the Tmux Monitor option on an SSH host (Host Manager → Terminal tab) to monitor its tmux sessions.
tmuxMonitor.tmuxInstallHint: Install it on the host with:
tmuxMonitor.attachTooltipPane: Open a terminal to {{host}} — tmux session {{session}}

mobileKeyboard.quickKeysDesc: Tap × to remove. Supports up to 8 characters.
